title: Audience Constraints
description: Buyer-defined audience targeting constraints for a campaign plan. Specifies who the campaign should and should not reach. The governance agent evaluates seller targeting against these constraints during check_governance.

include.description: Desired audience criteria. The seller's targeting should align with these. Each criterion is evaluated independently — the combined targeting should satisfy at least one inclusion criterion.

exclude.description: Excluded audience criteria. The seller's targeting must not overlap with these. Exclusions take precedence over inclusions. Used for protected groups, vulnerable communities, regulatory restrictions, or brand safety.
